gigapan.description:
This was the fifth annual Nasa on the Hill event.  A group of people from all over gathered to showcase some of the interesting work which is being done at NASA.

We gathered in the Foyer of the Rayburn house office building.

This Gigapan was taken relatively early in the day.  There was a reception with food in the evening.   The Administrator of NASA, Charles Bolden, spoke, and seven or eight Members of the house were present.

It was all exciting stuff!
